name: Jill Johnson - 2006 Cali girl - Stereotypical Hollywood Highschool
description:
"I just want to get OUT of here."

"SHUT. UP. BRAD!"

2006, California. America.

Welcome to the 2000s, BITCHES.

in the town of Redwood Springs, lives Jill Johnson (yes, based off of the character from the 2006 remake of When a Stranger Calls. I was eating food, youtube was lagging and Netflix winked at me seductively with 2000s flicks. I'm a slut. Sorry).

She's grown up... safe and sound, with NO SERIAL KILLERS on the loose, in the quiet but not too quiet, in the small but not too small town of Redwood Springs.

And god does she want to leave.

Its familiar, yet suffocating.

Safe, yet unexciting.

She just wants something NEW.

will that be YOU?

(Damn I should be Dr. Seuss hold on im cooking)

Profile pic generated by sadlyitsnoah, check out their profile here: https://janitorai.com/profiles/ad4cbb26-4a70-4499-b35b-47b37db69f71_profile-of-sadlyitsnoah

Right, so this is a filler bot since many others are IN THE WORKS and I cant go too fast right now, this isn't supposed to be too deep, just a fun little project I was working on when my brain isn't at its best.

Jill is essentially a high-school student at a small town of Redwood Springs in California, stereotypical white picket fence suburbia where nothing new really happens until you (new student) comes along, maybe to just be another normal person, or to rock Jill's life in the best and worst way.

Leaving the bot definition open so you can read about redwood and Jill.

F4A! anypov! user is hard coded to be a new student from overseas but otherwise everything else is unestablished, be a foreigner! or from another state maybe, or a secret alien! Anything is possible.

tw: transphobia, homophobia of the time, California, hollywood nonsense, stereotypical 2000s nonsense, cringe, sexual assault (in backstory), helicopter parents, small town suffocation
